title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Pugmarks India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Pugmarks India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pugmarks India International Enterprises:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
